features.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration - Curriculum Planning & Narrative Generation
features.description: Implement multi-agent system with three specialized agents: Curriculum Planner, Narrative Architect, and Diagnostic Specialist. These agents work together to decompose learning objectives into structured lesson plans, generate engaging stories using strictly allowed phonemes, and analyze student errors to suggest prescriptive teaching focuses. All agents share a scratchpad/conversation history for unified state management.
implementation_requirements: Set up LangChain or CrewAI orchestration framework
Implement Curriculum Planner agent to decompose objectives
Implement Narrative Architect agent (GPT-4o with Lexial databases)
Implement Diagnostic Specialist agent for error analysis
test_steps: Initialize orchestration system with three agents
Provide sample learning objectives
Verify Curriculum Planner decomposes into lesson plan
Verify Narrative Architect generates story with allowed phonemes
Provide sample student error data to Diagnostic Specialist
Confirm shared scratchpad maintains conversation history
Verify all agents can access and update shared state

features.title: RAG-Powered Pedagogical Grounding - Knowledge Retrieval System
features.description: Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system to ground outputs in validated science. System must retrieve specific rules from Structured Literacy documentation (Wilson Reading System, Orton-Gillingham, UFLI Foundations, FCRR) rather than relying on broad LLM knowledge. Pulls required word lists and activity data directly from FCRR resource database.
implementation_requirements: Set up vector database for RAG embeddings
Implement retrieval logic with relevance scoring
Configure GPT-4o with strict RAG constraints
Create fallback mechanisms for missing knowledge
Implement caching for frequently retrieved rules
test_steps: Query RAG system for specific phonics rules
Verify retrieved content matches Structured Literacy sources
Test word list retrieval from FCRR database
Verify GPT-4o respects RAG constraints
Test retrieval with edge-case literacy patterns
Confirm system doesn't generate content outside knowledge base
Benchmark retrieval latency and accuracy

features.title: Automated Phonetic Verification - G2P & Decodability Engine
features.description: Implement automated phonetic verification system using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) conversion via NVIDIA NeMo (G2P-Conformer) and CMU Pronouncing Dictionary. System must distinguish heteronyms by decomposing every word into constituent phonemes, maintain a 95% decodability rate to prevent students from guessing, and enforce orthographic rules (1-1-1 doubling rule, Y-to-I changes, etc.).
implementation_requirements: Implement orthographic rule engine (1-1-1 doubling, Y-to-I, etc.)
Add text analysis pipeline for content validation
test_steps: Convert sample words to phoneme sequences
Verify heteronym distinction (e.g., read/read)
Test phoneme validation against student reading level
Run decodability check on generated content
Verify 95% decodability rate is maintained
Test orthographic rule enforcement
Validate against edge-case phonetic patterns

features.title: Digital Interactivity & Gamification - UI & Mobile Features
features.description: Implement interactive digital interface with virtual blending boards, Text-to-Speech feedback, mobile haptic features, and adaptive gamification. Virtual blending boards allow students to drag letter tiles with TTS auditory feedback. Mobile haptic tapping provides subtle vibrations for multisensory sound segmenting. Adaptive gamification loops adjust difficulty in real-time with multisyllabic 'boss levels'.
implementation_requirements: Design and implement virtual blending board UI component
test_steps: Navigate to blending board interface
Drag letter tiles and verify TTS feedback
Test mobile haptic vibrations
Complete basic level and verify difficulty adjustment
Reach 'boss level' and verify multisyllabic challenge
Verify color-coding matches FCRR structure
Test accessibility features (text enlargement, high contrast)

features.title: Programmatic Print Generation - PDF & Worksheet Automation
features.description: Automate print production to support handwriting practice (encoding) and reduce screen fatigue. System uses ReportLab for pixel-precise layout of word cards, syllable cards, and sound mapping boxes. Interfaces with Canva API to suggest layouts and generate visually engaging worksheet templates. Print materials support multi-modal accessibility with automatic text enlargement, increased line spacing, and high-contrast modes.
implementation_requirements: Set up ReportLab for PDF generation
Integrate Canva API for layout suggestions
Implement print material accessibility (text size, spacing, contrast)
Create template system for worksheet layouts
test_steps: Generate word card PDF with sample content
Generate syllable card PDF with phonetic breakdown
Generate sound mapping worksheet
Verify pixel-precise layout accuracy
Test Canva API integration for layout suggestions
Generate print materials with accessibility features
Batch generate multiple worksheets
Verify print quality and legibility

meta_issue_details.title: [META] Project Progress Tracker
meta_issue_details.description: Tracking session progress for orchestrated implementation of Agentic Literacy Pipeline App
